# seerr_notification_ntfy (Data Source)

Read Seerr ntfy notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/ntfy.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `ntfy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ntfy))
- `types` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--ntfy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ntfy`

Read-Only:

- `auth_method_token` (Boolean)
- `auth_method_username_password` (Boolean)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `priority` (Number)
- `token` (String, Sensitive)
- `topic` (String)
- `url` (String)
- `username` (String)
